title: Quality Control Accessor (Car Workshop) [Ubi | 5.25 days | up to $3000] - LCYL
description:
QC Accessor (Car Workshop)

Salary: $2400 - $3000

Location: Ubi

Working Days & Hours:

  • Mondays to Fridays: 8.30am to 6pm
  • Alternate Saturdays: 8.30amto 12.30pm

Summary

We are seeking an experienced QC Assessor to join our automotive workshop. This role is responsible for conducting thorough quality inspections on completed vehicle repairs and maintenance work to ensure workmanship meets company and manufacturer standards before vehicle handover.

Responsibilities:

  • To assist the Workshop Supervisor in the daily running operations of the workshop.
  • To perform troubleshooting of vehicles with high degree of competency.
  • Ensure all work carried out complies with standard and quality requirements.
  • To perform completion checks on all service and repairs jobs to the fulfilment of customer's expectation.
  • Observe and perform detailed investigation in close cooperation with the Foreman and final quality checks of vehicles.
  • Provide support to workshop on matter related to product and repair technology with information.
  • Advise and practical assistance when necessary.
  • Report necessary additional repair works immediately to the Foreman, inform on the possibility of performing the tasks.
  • To support Foreman/service advisor on test drive and service-related matter.
  • To provide technical assistance to technicians.
  • Any other duties that may be assigned from time to time.

Job Requirements:

  • 3 years of relevant experience as a QC Assessor or in a similar role within an automotive repair workshop
  • Strong technical knowledge of vehicle systems and components, with the ability to identify and troubleshoot issues
  • Possess a Valid Class 3 driving license


Cheong Yeat Long | R25145358

The Supreme HR Advisory Pte Ltd | EA 14C7279
